details.test: Task 1 - Start trial for cheapest meal-plan between $15-25/month
Task 2 - Save beginner no-equipment home workout plan (>=3 sessions/week)
Task 3 - Create 3-day weekly schedule (Mon/Wed/Fri) with sessions under 45 minutes
Task 4 - Calculate weight-loss calories and email plan
Task 5 - Select annual plan under $40/month with most 1:1 coaching
Task 6 - Book evening live class under 45 minutes with rating 4.5+
Task 7 - Subscribe to training tips newsletter (3x/week, strength & mobility)
Task 8 - Ask via chat about pausing membership without losing progress
